framework.name: OAuth 2.1 deemed sufficient for single-domain synchronous agents
framework.description: The paper explicitly states existing OAuth 2.1 works for single trust domain synchronous operations but falls short for cross-domain, highly autonomous, asynchronous, or multi-user agent scenarios.
framework.raw_quote: Existing OAuth 2.1 frameworks, when used with AI agents, work well within single trust domains with synchronous agent operations... but may fall short in scenarios that are cross-domain, highly autonomous, or asynchronous

source.title: Identity Management for Agentic AI - OpenID
